title: I Built an AI Coloring Page Generator — Got 500+ Organic Visits in One Day
author: 好正
summary:
Just launched ColoringPage.live — an AI tool that turns text prompts into printable coloring pages. In one week, daily active users went from 0 to 500+.
How it works

  1. User enters a prompt Simple form input — e.g., "a dragon riding a bicycle" or "unicorn castle".
  2. AI generates the image Call an image generation API to output black & white line art. The key here is reducing noise — coloring pages need clean, clear outlines.
  3. Export as PDF Convert the image to a print-ready PDF using CSS, supporting A4 standard sizes. full_text:
Just launched ColoringPage.live — an AI tool that turns text prompts into printable coloring pages. In one week, daily active users went from 0 to 500+.

How it works

User enters a prompt
Simple form input — e.g., "a dragon riding a bicycle" or "unicorn castle".

AI generates the image
Call an image generation API to output black & white line art. The key here is reducing noise — coloring pages need clean, clear outlines.

Export as PDF
Convert the image to a print-ready PDF using CSS, supporting A4 standard sizes.
Growth strategy
Product Hunt launch → first batch of seed users
Hacker News Show submission → quality developer traffic
SEO optimization → ranking for long-tail keywords like "coloring page generator"
Revenue
One-time purchase model (credits never expire):
Starter $2.99 / 900 credits
Value $5.99 / 2200 credits
Mega $12.99 / 6500 credits
Current daily revenue ~$30, mainly from parents in the US and Europe.
What's next (based on our roadmap)
[ ] Multiple styles: simple (kids) / complex (adult) / mandala / cartoon / realistic
[ ] In-browser coloring tool: color online and save your work
[ ] PDF export: print-ready A4 format
[ ] Batch generation: create themed sets (Christmas, Halloween, etc.)
[ ] History: login to view and re-download past generations
[ ] Teacher mode: class management + bulk download
#AI #SaaS #IndieMaker #SideProject
